title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXXXIV. Natural History.
content:
I had a little pony,
            His name was Dapple-gray,
        I lent him to a lady,
            To ride a mile away;
        She whipped him, she slashed him,
            She rode him through the mire;
        I would not lend my pony now
            For all the lady's hire.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DLXXXIV. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
